# Premise-coherence required-verdict forcing-function — validator + template + JSDoc (AC1 of #13144)

AC1 slice of #13144 (premise-coherence verdict in agent PR review). #13144 spans two independent slices — AC1 (this: the validator forcing-function) and AC2 (the SEEN-firewall `AGENTS.md` L1 trigger scope-widen, the separate higher-blast slice) — but `agent-pr-body-lint` mandates exactly one isolated `Resolves #N` per PR (the 1-PR-per-ticket model). So #13144 is the parent and this is the AC1 sub; PR #13738 `Resolves` this.

## Scope (AC1)

Add a 4th **required** premise field — **Premise Coherence** — to the agent PR-review-body contract: the value-coherence verdict (*should this premise exist at all*, measured against the core values), forcing ARTICULATION (a specific verdict OR a scoped `N/A — no value-surface` for trivial PRs). Flip the premise snapshot from optional-during-migration to always-required (all four fields).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `PullRequestService` validator requires the `Premise Coherence` anchor + flips the premise snapshot optional→always-required (4 fields).
- [ ] `pr-review-template.md` + `pr-review-followup-template.md` carry the `**Premise Coherence:**` field after Patch Verdict.
- [ ] `pr-review-guide.md` §0 + the `manage_pr_review` openapi description reflect the required-4 premise.
- [ ] A review omitting the field returns `PR_REVIEW_TEMPLATE_VALIDATION_FAILED`; unit-covered.

## Out of Scope

- AC2: the SEEN-firewall `AGENTS.md` L1 trigger scope-widen (separate higher-blast slice, stays on parent #13144).

## Related

- Parent: #13144 (force a premise-coherence verdict in agent PR review)
- PR: #13738 (the implementation, 47 specs green)
